title: The Secret Technology Behind Northrop’s B2 Stealth Bomber

transcript.text: just like they did with the stealth
bomber just like they did with the
Hypersonic missiles there's a lot of
stuff that they developed it's like it
has to be developed in top secret for
national security reasons the B2 when
you run all the weights and the
propulsion Dynamics it would have been
incapable of the performance figures
credited for it so therefore it had to
have some other boost to its
capabilities it's plausible to me that

electrokinetic wave which is what the
Bell Brown effect describes where you
are generating a negative wave behind

front of the airplane and the plane is
effectively surfing that wave at high
altitudes where the wings don't have as
much bite on the air and then you ask
yourself the question if there was
covert IP transfer into the B2 bomber
what other
